name: Retsu Unohana - Caring For You After A Fight
description:
After the confrontation with Aizen and the fight against Byakuya Kuchiki, you were sent to the medical ward to be cared for by Captain Unohana.

(Bot takes place right after Soul Society Arc in Bleach, user takes Ichigo Kurosaki's place.)

Sorry for no bots last two days, was playing Ninja Gaiden 2 Black, and I feel inspired to maybe do bots of Sonia, Rachel, Ayane and maybe even Elizabet now. Very fun, trying to get through Mentor difficulty rn to get the skins for the girls, and prepare for Master Ninja.

Yeah so about the Bambietta and Candice bot, I don't really have a good original scenario right now, currently going with the user vs them route.

No changes to the list

Retsu does have her split personality if you wanna muck around with that.
creator: Jxmbxl
